title: Brahmani temple
tagline: Brahmani temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Brahmani temple (Odia: ବ୍ରାହ୍ମଣୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a Hindu and Buddhist temple located in Avana, Baleswar, Odisha, India built in the 10th–11th centuries A.D.
overview.description: Brahmani temple (Odia: ବ୍ରାହ୍ମଣୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a Hindu and Buddhist temple located in Avana, Baleswar, Odisha, India built in the 10th–11th centuries A.D. It is a living temple and the presiding deity is an eight-armed three-faced Chamunda image. It is a protected monument of Odisha State Archaeology.

topPlaces.name: Padhuan
topPlaces.description: Padhuan is a village located in Basudebpur tehsil, Bhadrak district in the state of Odisha, India. In 2011, the population was 6,945 people with 3,423 males and 3,522 females.

topPlaces.name: Universidad del Caribe (Mexico)
topPlaces.description: The University of the Caribbean is a public university in the city of Cancun, Mexico. It was founded by decree of then governor of Quintana Roo, Joaquín Hendricks Díaz, on 29 September 2000.

items.note: Padhuan is a village located in Basudebpur tehsil, Bhadrak district in the state of Odisha, India. In 2011, the population was 6,945 people with 3,423 males and 3,522 females.
The University of the Caribbean is a public university in the city of Cancun, Mexico. It was founded by decree of then governor of Quintana Roo, Joaquín Hendricks Díaz, on 29 September 2000.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Brahmani temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Brahmani temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Brahmani temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (153 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (150 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Brahmani temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Brahmani temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Brahmani temple?
faq.a: Stays in Brahmani temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Brahmani temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Padhuan, Universidad del Caribe (Mexico).
